case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTYSUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $1539.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTYSUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $1539.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF OF RAYMOND FONG REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,539.00 U.S. CURRENCY PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. THE FOLLOWING PROPERTY:$1,539.00 U.S. CURRENCY, HELD UNDER SFPD NUMBER 130-800-411 AND SEIZED UNDER SEARCH WARRANT IN THIS CASE, BE RELEASED TO THE SFPD FOR THE PURPOSES OF DISTRIBUTING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO 11489 H&S. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
